highlights: Patient chart header redesigned — patient name, MRN, age, and DOB are now prominently displayed at the top
Medications and Diagnoses widgets now use tab-style filters (Active / Inactive / All) instead of dropdowns
Click a medication status badge to inactivate it — a 5-second undo window lets you cancel the change
Double-click a medication's dose or frequency to edit it directly in the table
ICD-10 code lookup now shows results as you type, with local billing codes matching instantly
Edited medications show a warning icon so you know which values differ from the original EHR data
New Admin Rules Registry — see ALL monitoring and care gap rules in one unified, searchable page
Trigger testing: configure a synthetic patient and test whether any rule would fire
Filter monitoring rules by type, source, priority, and active status
Toggle rules active/inactive directly from the registry
New Medication Monitoring Catalog in Admin — browse all monitored medications, override intervals, and track coverage gaps
Monitoring Calendar now has a 'Why?' button explaining why each test is scheduled
New medications are automatically added to the catalog when clinical summaries are imported
Scenario testing for monitoring rules — verify accuracy with built-in test cases
VSAC dynamic value sets for billing code validation
Pre-visit billing overnight job with dashboard badges
Patient education → delayed message integration
Cache staleness indicators on API-powered pages
Configurable spell check confidence threshold
16 billing rule categories with provider toggle controls
5 clinical intelligence widgets on patient chart
Care gap → billing bridge integration
Drug recall scanning with Pushover alerts
Full API layer: RxNorm, OpenFDA, NLM, UMLS, ICD-10
Medication reference page with FDA label data
Clinical spell check with fuzzy matching
Lab tracking with trend visualization
Initial release: MRN reader, inbox monitor, scheduler
Patient chart viewer with CDA XML parsing
Time logging with idle detection
On-call note management
Pushover notification integration
